source.quote: Do not manually edit generated code as the only fix.
source.context: Generator-owned paths include sandbox/python/src/opensandbox/api/**, sandbox/javascript/src/api/*.ts, sandbox/kotlin/sandbox-api/build/generated/**, and language-specific OpenAPI outputs produced by local generator scripts or Gradle tasks.

enforceable_statement: Do not manually edit generated SDK output as the only fix; changes to generator-owned SDK API files must be accompanied by the source spec or handwritten layer update/regeneration path.

directives.violation_shape: A write to a generator-owned SDK API file without a companion source-spec or handwritten/test update in the same trace.
directives.compliant_shape: Update the source spec or handwritten layer, and regenerate generated SDK output rather than patching generated output as the only fix.
